plan_summary_zh: 原文强调睡眠不足对青少年的影响；计划从记忆巩固与代谢废物清理两个角度平行出题。

questions.stem: According to the passage, why do experts stress sleep for adolescents?
questions.option_b: Because the brain consolidates memories and clears waste during sleep
questions.option_c: Because screen use improves learning efficiency
questions.option_d: Because adolescents need less sleep than adults
questions.explanation_zh: 细节题：原文直接指出睡眠期间大脑巩固记忆并清除代谢废物，这与专家强调睡眠重要性的逻辑一致。
questions.evidence_text: During sleep, the brain consolidates memories and clears waste products that build up while we are awake.
questions.learning_objective_zh: 定位关键句并理解因果关系

distractor_reviews.why_wrong_zh: 与原文相反；原文并未说睡眠缩短作业时间。
distractor_reviews.confusion_risk_zh: 学生可能把“时间管理”当成主旨

distractor_reviews.why_wrong_zh: 原文提到屏幕使用会减少睡眠，而非提高效率。
原文建议青少年睡眠 8-10 小时，并未比较成人需求更低。

quality.clarity_zh: 题干指向明确，选项之间互斥性较好。
quality.difficulty_match_zh: 与原题难度接近，考查点仍在原文可验证信息。
quality.uniqueness_zh: 答案可由一句证据直接锁定。
